---
title: "Kader Library"
description: "Illustrated, from-scratch explainers — one topic at a time, each built to actually make the idea click. A growing collection."
listing:
  contents: explainers/**/index.qmd
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 2
  categories: numbered
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [image, title, description, categories, date, reading-time]
  feed: true
page-layout: full
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <style>
        .lib-hero{ border-radius:22px; padding:1.8rem 2rem; margin:.4rem 0 1.6rem; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.5); -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(18px) saturate(160%); backdrop-filter:blur(18px) saturate(160%); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.65); box-shadow:0 10px 32px rgba(76,74,152,0.12), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.7); color:#2e2c3a; }
        .lib-hero h2{ color:#1f1f2c !important; margin:0 0 .4rem; font-size:1.5rem; border:none; }
        .lib-hero p{ margin:0; color:#5a5870; font-size:1rem; max-width:60ch; }
        .quarto-listing .card{ border-radius:14px; }
        body.quarto-dark .lib-hero{ background:rgba(34,33,52,0.55); border-color:rgba(182,180,240,0.18); box-shadow:0 10px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.45), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(182,180,240,0.12); color:#d8d8e0; }
        body.quarto-dark .lib-hero h2{ color:#ffffff !important; }
        body.quarto-dark .lib-hero p{ color:#a0a0b8; }
      </style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="lib-hero">
  <h2>📚 Kader Library</h2>
  <p>Illustrated, from-scratch explainers — each one built to make a single idea genuinely click, with diagrams and interactive bits. New chapters get added over time.</p>
</div>
```
